class=\"serp__results\">\n          <div id=\"links\" class=\"results\">\n            \n\n            \n              \n                <div class=\"result results_links results_links_deep web-result \">\n                  <div class=\"links_main links_deep result__body\"> <!-- This is the visible part -->\n                    \n                      <h2 class=\"result__title\">\n                        <a rel=\"nofollow\" class=\"result__a\" href=\"//duckduckgo.com/l/?uddg=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.scribd.com%2Fdocument%2F453022780%2FQMSE01%2DSyllabus%2Dpdf&amp;rut=8813504e219c2c607e5d9613fcb03de5c8148c128ff34befbe6ded322d6a6a99\">Quantum Mechanics Course Syllabus</a>\n                      </h2>\n\n                    \n\n                    \n                      <div class=\"result__extras\">\n                        <div class=\"result__extras__url\">\n                          <span class=\"result__icon\">\n                            <a rel=\"nofollow\" href=\"//duckduckgo.com/l/?uddg=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.scribd.com%2Fdocument%2F453022780%2FQMSE01%2DSyllabus%2Dpdf&amp;rut=8813504e219c2c607e5d9613fcb03de5c8148c128ff34befbe6ded322d6a6a99\">\n                              <img class=\"result__icon__img\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" alt=\"\" src=\"//external-content.duckduckgo.com/ip3/www.scribd.com.ico\" name=\"i15\" />\n                            </a>\n                          </span>\n                          <a class=\"result__url\" href=\"//duckduckgo.com/l/?uddg=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.scribd.com%2Fdocument%2F453022780%2FQMSE01%2DSyllabus%2Dpdf&amp;rut=8813504e219c2c607e5d9613fcb03de5c8148c128ff34befbe6ded322d6a6a99\">\n                            www.scribd.com/document/453022780/QMSE01-Syllabus-pdf\n                          </a>\n                          \n                        </div>\n                      </div>\n                    \n\n                    \n                      \n                        <a class=\"result__snippet\" href=\"//duckduckgo.com/l/?uddg=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.scribd.com%2Fdocument%2F453022780%2FQMSE01%2DSyllabus%2Dpdf&amp;rut=8813504e219c2c607e5d9613fcb03de5c8148c128ff34befbe6ded322d6a6a99\">This document outlines the <b>syllabus</b> and <b>textbook</b> references for a <b>quantum mechanics</b> course taught by David Miller at <b>Stanford University</b> over 9 weeks. The course introduces concepts such as the Schrodinger equation, particle in a box solutions, harmonic oscillators, angular momentum, and the hydrogen atom. It also covers approximation methods like perturbation theory. The recommended <b>textbook</b> ...</a>\n                      \n                    \n\n                    <div class=\"clear\"></div>\n                  </div>\n                </div>\n              \n            \n              \n                <div class=\"result results_links results_links_deep web-result \">\n                  <div class=\"links_main links_deep result__body\"> <!-- This is the visible part -->\n                    \n                      <h2 class=\"result__title\">\n                        <a rel=\"nofollow\" class=\"result__a\" href=\"//duckduckgo.com/l/?uddg=https%3A%2F%2Fweb.stanford.edu%2F~lindrew%2F8.04.pdf&amp;rut=ea010e1400821924f19f9e6a023be9179041ab709e49e04eb818f6ebbb7b5600\"><span class=\"result__type\">PDF</span> 8.04: QuantumPhysicsI(OCW) - Stanford University</a>\n                      </h2>\n\n                    \n\n                    \n                      <div class=\"result__extras\">\n                        <div class=\"result__extras__url\">\n                          <span class=\"result__icon\">\n                            <a rel=\"nofollow\" href=\"//duckduckgo.com/l/?uddg=https%3A%2F%2Fweb.stanford.edu%2F~lindrew%2F8.04.pdf&amp;rut=ea010e1400821924f19f9e6a023be9179041ab709e49e04eb818f6ebbb7b5600\">\n                              <img class=\"result__icon__img\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" alt=\"\" src=\"//external-content.duckduckgo.com/ip3/web.stanford.edu.ico\" name=\"i15\" />\n                            </a>\n                          </span>\n                          <a class=\"result__url\" href=\"//duckduckgo.com/l/?uddg=https%3A%2F%2Fweb.stanford.edu%2F~lindrew%2F8.04.pdf&amp;rut=ea010e1400821924f19f9e6a023be9179041ab709e49e04eb818f6ebbb7b5600\">\n                            web.stanford.edu/~lindrew/8.04.pdf\n                          </a>\n                          \n                        </div>\n                      </div>\n                    \n\n                    \n                      \n                        <a class=\"result__snippet\" href=\"//duckduckgo.com/l/?uddg=https%3A%2F%2Fweb.stanford.edu%2F~lindrew%2F8.04.pdf&amp;rut=ea010e1400821924f19f9e6a023be9179041ab709e49e04eb818f6ebbb7b5600\">Lecture 1: Overview of <b>Quantum Mechanics</b> <b>Quantum mechanics</b> is a subject that takes time to learn, and we&#x27;ll start by giving some perspective (explaining where we&#x27;re going, introducing the basic features and ideas, and describing what&#x27;s surprising about <b>quantum mechanics</b>). The subject is almost a hundred years old now, and oficially we can think of the subject as starting in 1925, which ...</a>\n                      \n                    \n\n                    <div class=\"clear\"></div>\n                  </div>\n                </div>\n              \n            \n              \n                <div class=\"result results_links results_links_deep web-result \">\n                  <div class=\"links_main links_deep result__body\"> <!-- This is the visible part -->\n                    \n                      <h2 class=\"result__title\">\n                        <a rel=\"nofollow\" class=\"result__a\" href=\"//duckduckgo.com/l/?uddg=https%3A%2F%2Fcs269q.stanford.edu%2Finfo.html&amp;rut=07fa54652572ff5d80a506a00dfa8550efdfe91de911cadf12c9083a91521ae9\">CS 269Q: Elements of Quantum Computer Programming - Stanford University</a>\n                      </h2>\n\n                    \n\n                    \n                      <div class=\"result__extras\">\n                        <div class=\"result__extras__url\">\n                          <span class=\"result__icon\">\n                            <a rel=\"nofollow\" href=\"//duckduckgo.com/l/?uddg=https%3A%2F%2Fcs269q.stanford.edu%2Finfo.html&amp;rut=07fa54652572ff5d80a506a00dfa8550efdfe91de911cadf12c9083a91521ae9\">\n                              <img class=\"result__icon__img\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" alt=\"\" src=\"//external-content.duckduckgo.com/ip3/cs269q.stanford.edu.ico\" name=\"i15\" />\n                            </a>\n                          </span>\n                          <a class=\"result__url\" href=\"//duckduckgo.com/l/?uddg=https%3A%2F%2Fcs269q.stanford.edu%2Finfo.html&amp;rut=07fa54652572ff5d80a506a00dfa8550efdfe91de911cadf12c9083a91521ae9\">\n                            cs269q.stanford.edu/info.html\n                          </a>\n                          \n                        </div>\n                      </div>\n                    \n\n                    \n                      \n                        <a class=\"result__snippet\" href=\"//duckduckgo.com/l/?uddg=https%3A%2F%2Fcs269q.stanford.edu%2Finfo.html&amp;rut=07fa54652572ff5d80a506a00dfa8550efdfe91de911cadf12c9083a91521ae9\">A physics and <b>quantum mechanics</b> background is not required, but students will need an understanding of linear algebra at the level of the intro courses (e.g. Math 51). Moreover, students will need some familiarity with computer programming. CS 107 (Computer Organization &amp; Systems) or equivalent is strongly recommended. <b>Textbook</b> and Readings</a>\n                      \n                    \n\n                    <div class=\"clear\"></div>\n                  </div>\n                </div>\n              \n            \n\n            \n              \n              \n                <div class=\"nav-link\">\n                  <form action=\"/html/\" method=\"post\">\n                    <input type=\"submit\" class='btn btn--alt' value=\"Next\" />\n                    <input type=\"hidden\" name=\"q\" value=\"&quot;Stanford University&quot; &quot;quantum mechanics&quot; syllabus textbook\" />\n                    <input type=\"hidden\" name=\"s\" value=\"10\" />\n                    <input type=\"hidden\" name=\"nextParams\" value=\"\" />\n                    <input type=\"hidden\" name=\"v\" value=\"l\" />\n                    <input type=\"hidden\" name=\"o\" value=\"json\" />\n                    <input type=\"hidden\" name=\"dc\" value=\"4\" />\n                    <input type=\"hidden\" name=\"api\" value=\"d.js\" />\n                    <input type=\"hidden\" name=\"vqd\" value=\"4-192037863658641581525171573613535781144\" />\n\n                    \n                    \n                    \n                      <input name=\"kl\" value=\"wt-wt\" type=\"hidden\" />\n                    \n                    \n                    \n                    \n                  </form>\n                </div>\n              \n            \n\n            <div class=\"feedback-btn\">\n              <a rel=\"nofollow\" href=\"//duckduckgo.com/feedback.html\" target=\"_new\">Feedback</a>\n            </div>\n            <div class=\"clear\"></div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      </div> <!-- links wrapper //-->\n    \n  </div>\n\n  <div id=\"bottom_spacing2\"></div>\n\n  \n    <img src=\"//duckduckgo.com/t/sl_h\"/>\n  \n</body>\n</html>"}
